name: Air New Zealand Limited
analysis: AIZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 31% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.3800. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.3800, stop A$0.3317, target A$0.4950 (2.38:1) — then trail it.
